property.desc: Region for Amazon Polly speech engine
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.aws.region

property.desc: Access key for Amazon Polly speech engine
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.aws.accesskey

property.desc: Speaking rate
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.speech-rate

property.desc: Disable job messages below this level
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.log.level

property.desc: API key for Google cloud speech engine
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.google.apikey

property.desc: Priority of Azure voices relative to voices of other engines
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.azure.priority

property.desc: Enable Amazon Polly
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.aws.enabled

property.desc: Audio sample rate of legacy Windows voices (in Hz)
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.sapi.samplerate

property.desc: API key for Mistral OCR
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.ocr.mistral.apikey

property.desc: Whether or not to make the TTS log available
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.log

property.desc: Access key for Azure cognitive speech engine
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.azure.key

property.desc: Priority of Amazon voices relative to voices of other engines
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.aws.priority

property.desc: Audio bit depth of legacy Windows voices (in bytes per sample)
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.sapi.bytespersample

property.desc: Priority of Google cloud voices relative to voices of other engines
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.google.priority

property.desc: Region for Azure cognitive speech engine
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.azure.region

property.desc: Default user lexicons
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.default-lexicon

property.desc: Enable Windows
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.sapi.enabled

property.desc: TTS configuration (XML or file path)
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.config

property.desc: Priority of Windows voices relative to voices of other engines
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.sapi.priority

property.desc: Audio sample rate of Google cloud voices (in Hz)
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.google.samplerate

property.desc: Bit rate of MP3 files
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.mp3.bitrate

property.desc: Enable Azure
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.azure.enabled

property.desc: Enable Google
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.google.enabled

property.desc: Secret key for Amazon Polly speech engine
property.name: org.daisy.pipeline.tts.aws.secretkey
